functions.name: deploy-landing-zone
functions.description: Deploy AI Landing Zone to Azure — validate Bicep with AVM modules, deploy hub-spoke networking, configure private endpoints, set up RBAC, enable monitoring. Use when: deploy, provision, Bicep, infrastructure, landing zone, networking.

functions.name: evaluate-landing-zone
functions.description: Evaluate AI Landing Zone security and compliance — audit private endpoints, NSG rules, RBAC assignments, diagnostic settings, encryption, network isolation. Use when: evaluate, audit, security, compliance, review, assess.
